_comment: Rename this file to settings.json and configure as needed. The MCP servers below are examples — uncomment and fill in as you set them up. Format may vary by Claude Code version; check the docs.

_edgartools_example._comment: EdgarTools MCP — free, no API key needed. See https://www.edgartools.io/edgartools-mcp-for-sec-filings/

_sec_edgar_alternative._comment: Alternative: edgar.tools hosted MCP, OAuth via Google. See https://www.edgar.tools/mcp
